'''thowaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:measleslike|measleslike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:measleslike|measleslike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thowaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowarithi|thowarithi]] || [[word:thowariji|thowariji]] || [[word:thowarishi|thowarishi]] || [[word:thowariki|thowariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowaruthuthu|thowaruthuthu]] || [[word:thowarujuju|thowarujuju]] || [[word:thowarushushu|thowarushushu]] || [[word:thowarukuku|thowarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowaruthu|thowaruthu]] || [[word:thowaruju|thowaruju]] || [[word:thowarushu|thowarushu]] || [[word:thowaruku|thowaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowarufthuf|thowarufthuf]] || [[word:thowarufjuf|thowarufjuf]] || [[word:thowarufshuf|thowarufshuf]] || [[word:thowarufkuf|thowarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowarethe|thowarethe]] || [[word:thowareje|thowareje]] || [[word:thowareshe|thowareshe]] || [[word:thowareke|thowareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowarothotho|thowarothotho]] || [[word:thowarojojo|thowarojojo]] || [[word:thowaroshosho|thowaroshosho]] || [[word:thowarokoko|thowarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowarotho|thowarotho]] || [[word:thowarojo|thowarojo]] || [[word:thowarosho|thowarosho]] || [[word:thowaroko|thowaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowarofthof|thowarofthof]] || [[word:thowarofjof|thowarofjof]] || [[word:thowarofshof|thowarofshof]] || [[word:thowarofkof|thowarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowarïfthïf|thowarïfthïf]] || [[word:thowarïfjïf|thowarïfjïf]] || [[word:thowarïfshïf|thowarïfshïf]] || [[word:thowarïfkïf|thowarïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowarïfthïfthïf|thowarïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thowarïfjïfjïf|thowarïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thowarïfshïfshïf|thowarïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thowarïfkïfkïf|thowarïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowarïfthïf|thowarïfthïf]] || [[word:thowarïfjïf|thowarïfjïf]] || [[word:thowarïfshïf|thowarïfshïf]] || [[word:thowarïfkïf|thowarïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowarïfthïf|thowarïfthïf]] || [[word:thowarïfjïf|thowarïfjïf]] || [[word:thowarïfshïf|thowarïfshïf]] || [[word:thowarïfkïf|thowarïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowaræthæ|thowaræthæ]] || [[word:thowaræjæ|thowaræjæ]] || [[word:thowaræshæ|thowaræshæ]] || [[word:thowarækæ|thowarækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowarathatha|thowarathatha]] || [[word:thowarajaja|thowarajaja]] || [[word:thowarashasha|thowarashasha]] || [[word:thowarakaka|thowarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowaratha|thowaratha]] || [[word:thowaraja|thowaraja]] || [[word:thowarasha|thowarasha]] || [[word:thowaraka|thowaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowarafthaf|thowarafthaf]] || [[word:thowarafjaf|thowarafjaf]] || [[word:thowarafshaf|thowarafshaf]] || [[word:thowarafkaf|thowarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thowarasha|thowarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowarshësha|thowarshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowarosha|thowarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowarmusha|thowarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowaryasha|thowaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowarnkshësha|gothowarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowarnkrosha|gothowarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowarnkmusha|gothowarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowarnkyasha|gothowarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thowawarasha|thowawarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowawarshësha|thowawarshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowawarosha|thowawarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowawarmusha|thowawarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowawaryasha|thowawaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowawarnkshësha|gothowawarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowawarnkrosha|gothowawarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowawarnkmusha|gothowawarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowawarnkyasha|gothowawarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thewærasha|thewærasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thewærshësha|thewærshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thewærosha|thewærosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thewærmusha|thewærmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thewæryasha|thewæryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothewærnkshësha|gothewærnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothewærnkrosha|gothewærnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothewærnkmusha|gothewærnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothewærnkyasha|gothewærnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thowfarasha|thowfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowfarshësha|thowfarshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowfarosha|thowfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowfarmusha|thowfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowfaryasha|thowfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowfarnkshësha|gothowfarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowfarnkrosha|gothowfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowfarnkmusha|gothowfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowfarnkyasha|gothowfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
